title: conyza japonica
intro: Conyza japonica, also known as Japanese fleabane or fleabane, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, belonging to the daisy family and known for its white or pink flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Conyza japonica include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. The health benefits of Conyza japonica include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to improve cardiovascular health and boost the immune system. Conyza japonica can be prepared as a tea, infuse in oil, or dried and powdered for use in capsules or as a topical cream, showcasing its versatility in herbal medicine.
